title: NMSA 1-1-3.3. Election-related organization
text:
1-1-3.3. Election-related organization. 
As used in the Election Code, "election-related organization" means an organization 
registered with the secretary of state that is involved in election monitoring or voter turnout 
activities, but does not include a qualified political party in an election in which the political party 
is represented on the ballot.

History: Laws 2011, ch. 137, § 2; 2019, ch. 212, § 1.
